title: Case/Care Management * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Case/Care Management * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Deafness Disabilities Issues Hard of Hearing Older Adults Hispanic/Latino Community Immigrants Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Homeless Veterans Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE HUMAN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers provide comprehensive, wraparound human and social services. Staff intervene in crisis situations with direct assistance, classes, referrals, and advocacy. Offer assistance to women and children in distress, and a safe place for runaway teenagers. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD HUMAN SERVICES
